# JobHuntingU

> AI-Powered Job Search System & Community

## Summary
JobHuntingU combines cutting-edge AI strategies with high-energy community support to help professionals land their dream roles faster. We offer personalized coaching, automated outreach systems, and a supportive ecosystem for job seekers.

## Pages
- [Home](https://jobhuntingu.com/): Land interviews faster with AI-powered job search systems, coaching, and automation.
- [About Us](https://jobhuntingu.com/about): Meet the team and learn about our mission to transform the job search experience.
- [Services](https://jobhuntingu.com/services): Explore our service tiers, including the Community Hub, Mastermind, and VIP "Done For You" programs.
- [Contact Us](https://jobhuntingu.com/contact): Book a free discovery call to discuss your career goals and how we can help.
